cards.title: Father wants to include new partner in family
cards.body: A father has left the mother and wants his children to accept his new partner. The advice explores balancing fairness with maintaining healthy family relationships.

cards.title: Can't afford tutoring for grammar school entrance?
cards.body: A parent worries their bright daughter won't reach her potential without expensive tutoring. The advice suggests her needs differ from the parent's own school experience and that parental support matters most.

cards.title: Family holiday anxiety taught me real resilience
cards.body: A parent struggled with catastrophic thinking during family vacation. When an actual emergency occurred, they discovered they could handle real crisis better than anticipated worries.

cards.title: Only child parenting breaks harmful stereotypes
cards.body: Only children face persistent prejudice as selfish or lonely, yet their numbers are rising. Parents choosing one child shouldn't be judged for this deeply personal decision.

cards.title: Understanding kids' attention-seeking behavior better
cards.body: When children demand constant attention, stricter boundaries often backfire. Understanding the root cause and responding with connection proves more effective.

cards.title: Help teenagers make better decisions now
cards.body: Brain development continues until age 25, yet teens face high-stakes choices daily. Parents can guide decision-making by supporting their growing judgment skills.

cards.title: Recognizing verbal abuse from adult parents
cards.body: Interactions with a parent that leave you doubting yourself or feeling drained may signal emotional abuse. Learning to reclaim your voice is crucial for adult children.

cards.title: Young adults living with parents again
cards.body: Rising costs force many young adults back home with their parents. Clear boundaries and communication help avoid conflict while saving to move out.

cards.title: What major maternity review reveals about care
cards.body: A major review has identified systemic failures in hospital maternity care. These findings highlight critical gaps in support for pregnant women and newborns.
